TV Series.title: Intervention
TV Series.overview: Emmy-Award winning series of profiles in addiction, with backstories and the current crisis that brings about family intervention and hope in rehab.

TV Series.title: Incredible Northern Vets
TV Series.overview: Follow the adventures of three Indigenous veterinarians across western Canada as they keep pets and wildlife healthy and happy.

TV Series.title: Daughter of Fire
TV Series.overview: A woman returns to her town under a new identity to take revenge on those who tried to kill her.

Movies.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
Movies.overview: A woman's ex-husband shows up minutes after a masked intruder has assaulted her in her home. His answers to the authorities don't seem to add up, which makes him the prime suspect in the attack.

Movies.title: Angel On The Clock
Movies.overview: Una niña enferma desea detener el tiempo, pero este deseo la llevará a una aventura transicional.

Movies.title: 1938: When Mexico Recovered Its Oil
Movies.overview: En 1938, Lázaro Cárdenas enfrenta el reto de expropiar la industria petrolera. El filme retrata tensiones entre gobierno, compañías y pueblo, mostrando la unidad nacional que marcó el rumbo de México.
